services.name: Option Suivi
services.label: Letter tracking add-on
services.description: Optional tracking for eligible letter products when purchased online (e.g. Mon timbre en ligne). Not all formats or destinations support it.

services.name: Lettre recommandée
services.label: Registered letter
services.description: Recommandé with proof of mailing and tracking; optional avis de réception depending on purchase path. Online purchase where La Poste offers it.

services.name: Lettre recommandée avec avis de réception
services.label: Registered letter with return receipt
services.description: Recommandé with return receipt (AR). Availability varies by destination; order online only when the flow exposes the option.
